creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-12-27 15:14:32 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    comms                Makefile 
  Added files:
    comms/atslog         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    comms/atslog/files   atslogd.in pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  The ATSlog software provides a handy Web-oriented interface for collecting,
  viewing and analyzing calls for various types of PBX (Private Branch eXchange)
  models. At present, the program operates successfully with Panasonic, Samsung,
  Hybrex, Siemens, LG, and Alcatel PBX models.
  
  WWW: http://www.atslog.dp.ua/en/about/
  
  PR:             ports/107169
  Submitted by:   Alexander Logvinov <ports at logvinov.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.168     +1 -0      ports/comms/Makefile
  1.1       +124 -0    ports/comms/atslog/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/comms/atslog/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/comms/atslog/files/atslogd.in (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/comms/atslog/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/comms/atslog/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +335 -0    ports/comms/atslog/pkg-plist (new)
